name: RWR Transportation LTD
recent_news: No M&A or news found. Yellow Pages and a Facebook page exist for 'RWR Transportation Service' in Cleveland but service scope is undocumented.
fit_notes: Micro 2-employee Cleveland operator with no visible school-bus footprint or website. Too small and undocumented to qualify as a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Take 2 Transport LLC
service_types: wheelchair / handicapped transport for adults & seniors
recent_news: BBB profile confirms FMCSA MC license #2638095 (exp. 1/3/2027). Explicitly serves only adults and seniors, not children — not a school transportation provider.
fit_notes: NOT A FIT — adult/senior NEMT operator per BBB, explicitly no children. Out of scope for a school-bus tuck-in. Recommend remove from target list.

name: Voyager Transport Svc LLC
recent_news: D&B and OhioBiz list Voyager Transport Service LLC at Cleveland Heights (44118) as a trucking company with ~$96K revenue and ~2 employees. No school-bus or SPED footprint found. Distinct from FMCSA 'Voyager Transportation Services Inc' (separate USDOT entity).
fit_notes: Likely a micro trucking LLC, not a school-bus operator. No districts, no fleet info, no website. Not a viable Summit tuck-in.

name: BJ Enterprise Limo Svc In
recent_news: Name does not appear in NJDOE 2020-21 school bus contractor county list. A 'BJ's Transportation, Inc.' is listed there but appears to be a different entity. No website or M&A news found.
fit_notes: Micro Irvington limo-service LLC; not confirmed on NJDOE contractor list. Too small/undocumented for Summit tuck-in. Possible private livery rather than school-bus operator.

name: Coast To Coast Limousine Svc
recent_news: No M&A, district contracts, or news found. Not located in NJDOE school bus contractor lists; SOMSD (South Orange-Maplewood) transportation is district-run or contracted to larger operators.
fit_notes: 2-employee home-address (residential Tuscan Rd) limo LLC; no school-bus footprint, no website. Not a viable Summit tuck-in.
